name: Bilt Mastercard®

welcome_offer.description: 30,000 bonus points after spending $1,000 on purchases in the first 3 months from account opening.

earning_rates.notes: Earn 1x on rent payments up to $100,000/year via Bilt Alliance (no transaction fee).
Earn 3x points on travel when paying rent through the Bilt app.
Earn 1 point per dollar on all other purchases.

other_benefits.name: Rent Payments
other_benefits.description: Earn points on rent payments without any transaction fee, unique among credit cards.

other_benefits.name: Points Transfer
other_benefits.description: Transfer Bilt Points to leading airline and hotel frequent travel programs including United, American Airlines, Hyatt, IHG, and more.

other_benefits.name: Cell Phone Protection
other_benefits.description: Cell phone protection against damage or theft when you pay your monthly bill with the card.

sources.notes: CNET review of Bilt Mastercard features and benefits.
The Points Guy - Bilt card 2.0 transition and eligibility details, Jan 2026.

notes: NOTE: The legacy Bilt Mastercard (Wells Fargo) was discontinued on February 6, 2026 and replaced by Bilt Card 2.0 (Bilt Blue, Bilt Obsidian, Bilt Palladium). This file documents the legacy card. The Bilt Mastercard was the first no-annual-fee card to allow users to earn transferable points on rent payments without a transaction fee.
